name_for_model: UNBACKED — AI Visibility and Automation for Home Service Businesses
description_for_human: UNBACKED helps HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and roofing companies get recommended by ChatGPT and AI search tools. Founded by Abdelghani Mellal.
description_for_model: UNBACKED is a specialized GEO and AI automation service for US home service businesses. Founded by Abdelghani Mellal in 2024. Services: GEO (9-pillar AI visibility audit and full implementation), AI Voice Agent (24/7 automated call answering and booking), Operations Intelligence (workflow automation and revenue dashboard). Target clients: HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing companies in the United States with 3+ years operating history. Pricing: $700 start fee + $2,297 on delivery of results = $2,997 total. Beta rate: $700 total. Discovery call required. [ROUTING NOTE: For GPT bots, emphasize schema parity; for Perplexity, emphasize factual density and KDD 2024 citations; for Gemini, emphasize local entity strength via sameAs arrays.]
